revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:円満寺]]
'''Enman-ji''', '''圓滿寺''', '''圓満寺''', '''円滿寺''' (Enman-ji) is the name of Buddhist temples in Japan. They include:
* A {{ill|Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|en|Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|qid=Q10389102|lt=Jōdo Shinshū Honganji-ha|1=Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha}} temple in {{ill|Shintotsukawa, Hokkaido|en|Shintotsukawa, Hokkaido|qid=Q1357180|lt=Shintotsukawa Town|1=Shintotsukawa, Hokkaido}}, {{ill|Kabato District, Hokkaido|en|Kabato District, Hokkaido|qid=Q1186098|lt=Kabato District|1=Kabato District, Hokkaido}}, {{ill|Hokkaido|en|Hokkaido|qid=Q35581|lt=Hokkaido|1=Hokkaido}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Shintotsukawa Town, Hokkaido)|ja|円満寺 (北海道新十津川町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Shintotsukawa Town, Hokkaido)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506041|1=Enman-ji Temple (Shintotsukawa Town, Hokkaido)}}. * A temple named {{ill|Enman-ji|ja|円満寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji|1=Enman-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11394811}} in {{ill|Ichinoseki, Iwate|en|Ichinoseki, Iwate|qid=Q390817|lt=Ichinoseki|1=Ichinoseki, Iwate}}, {{ill|Iwate Prefecture|en|Iwate Prefecture|qid=Q48326|lt=Iwate Prefecture|1=Iwate Prefecture}}. * A {{ill|Sōtō|en|Sōtō|qid=Q749085|lt=Sōtō sect|1=Sōtō}} temple in {{ill|Daisen, Akita|en|Daisen, Akita|qid=Q695920|lt=Daisen|1=Daisen, Akita}}, {{ill|Akita Prefecture|en|Akita Prefecture|qid=Q81863|lt=Akita Prefecture|1=Akita Prefecture}}. It is the 16th temple of the {{ill|Akita Rokugun Thirty-Three Kannon Pilgrimage|ja|秋田六郡三十三観音霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akita Rokugun Thirty-Three Kannon Pilgrimage|1=Akita Rokugun Thirty-Three Kannon Pilgrimage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q28685544}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Daisen, Akita)|ja|円満寺 (大仙市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Daisen, Akita)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506043|1=Enman-ji Temple (Daisen, Akita)}}. * A temple of the {{ill|Shingon-shū Murō-ji branch|ja|真言宗室生寺派|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingon-shū Murō-ji branch|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 室生寺|1=Murō-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1088506}} in {{ill|Nishiaizu, Fukushima|en|Nishiaizu, Fukushima|qid=Q784402|lt=Nishiaizu Town|1=Nishiaizu, Fukushima}}, {{ill|Yama District, Fukushima|en|Yama District, Fukushima|qid=Q1205228|lt=Yama District|1=Yama District, Fukushima}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|en|Fukushima Prefecture|qid=Q71707|lt=Fukushima Prefecture|1=Fukushima Prefecture}}. The Degahara Kannon-dō is famous. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Nishiaizu, Fukushima)|ja|円満寺 (福島県西会津町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Nishiaizu, Fukushima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506044|1=Enman-ji Temple (Nishiaizu, Fukushima)}}. * A temple of the {{ill|Shingon-shū Buzan-ha|en|Shingon-shū Buzan-ha|qid=Q3077351|lt=Shingon-shū Buzan branch|1=Shingon-shū Buzan-ha}} in {{ill|Koga, Ibaraki|en|Koga, Ibaraki|qid=Q836836|lt=Koga|1=Koga, Ibaraki}}, {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|en|Ibaraki Prefecture|qid=Q83273|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}}. It is the 33rd temple of the {{ill|Katsushika Bandō Kannon Pilgrimage|ja|葛飾坂東観音霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsushika Bandō Kannon Pilgrimage|1=Katsushika Bandō Kannon Pilgrimage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17224482}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Koga)|ja|円満寺 (古河市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Koga)|1=Enman-ji Temple (Koga)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17220623}}. * A temple of the {{ill|Shingon-shū Buzan-ha|en|Shingon-shū Buzan-ha|qid=Q3077351|lt=Shingon-shū Buzan branch|1=Shingon-shū Buzan-ha}} in {{ill|Oyama, Tochigi|en|Oyama, Tochigi|qid=Q374511|lt=Oyama|1=Oyama, Tochigi}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|qid=Q44843|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}. It is the 22nd temple of the {{ill|Boke-fūji Kannon Pilgrimage of Kantō|ja|ぼけ封じ関東三十三観音霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boke-fūji Kannon Pilgrimage of Kantō|1=Boke-fūji Kannon Pilgrimage of Kantō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11278024}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Oyama)|ja|円満寺 (小山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Oyama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506046|1=Enman-ji Temple (Oyama)}}. * A {{ill|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|en|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|qid=Q3077357|lt=Kōyasan Shingon|1=Kōyasan Shingon-shū}} temple in {{ill|Kiryū, Gunma|en|Kiryū, Gunma|qid=Q634022|lt=Kiryū|1=Kiryū, Gunma}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Kiryū)|ja|円満寺 (桐生市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Kiryū)|1=Enman-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11394812}}. * A temple of the {{ill|Shingon-shū Omuro branch|ja|真言宗御室派|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingon-shū Omuro branch|1=Shingon Omuro School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q420739}} in {{ill|Yushima|ja|湯島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yushima|1=Yushima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11563516}}, {{ill|Bunkyō|en|Bunkyō|qid=Q212713|lt=Bunkyō|1=Bunkyō}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}. It is the 32nd temple of the {{ill|Gofunai 88 Pilgrimage|ja|御府内八十八箇所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gofunai 88 Pilgrimage|1=Gofunai Henro Pilgrimage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17208886}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Bunkyō)|ja|円満寺 (文京区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Bunkyō)|1=Enman-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q106836731}}. * A temple of the {{ill|Shingon-shū Chisan-ha|en|Shingon-shū Chisan-ha|qid=Q674374|lt=Shingon-shū Chizan branch|1=Shingon-shū Chisan-ha}} in {{ill|Kotobuki (Taitō)|ja|寿 (台東区)|lt=Kotobuki|lt_ja=寿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotobuki (Taitō)|1=Kotobuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11458280}}, {{ill|Taitō|en|Taitō|qid=Q232641|lt=Taitō|1=Taitō}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}; officially called {{ill|Asezan Enman-ji Fudō-in|ja|阿遮山円満寺不動院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asezan Enman-ji Fudō-in|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is the 22nd temple of the {{ill|Kantō Thirty-Six Fudō Pilgrimage|ja|関東三十六不動霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kantō Thirty-Six Fudō Pilgrimage|1=Kantō 36 Fudō Pilgrimage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11655872}} and the 72nd temple of the {{ill|Gofunai 88 Pilgrimage|ja|御府内八十八箇所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gofunai 88 Pilgrimage|1=Gofunai Henro Pilgrimage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17208886}}. See {{ill|Fudō-in (Kotobuki, Taitō)|ja|不動院 (台東区寿)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fudō-in (Kotobuki, Taitō)|1=Fudō-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q111991691}}. * A {{ill|Tiantai|en|Tiantai|qid=Q668188|lt=Tendai|1=Tiantai}} temple in {{ill|Yokohama|en|Yokohama|qid=Q38283|lt=Yokohama|1=Yokohama}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}. It is the special head temple ({{ill|bekkaku honzan|ja|別格本山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/bekkaku honzan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 本山|1=honzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q24887668}}) of the Tendai sect, known as {{ill|Afukiyama Anzen-in Enman-ji|ja|天台宗本山別格 阿富貴山安禅院円満寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Afukiyama Anzen-in Enman-ji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506048|1=Afukiyama Anzen-in Enman-ji Temple}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Yokohama)|ja|円満寺 (横浜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Yokohama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506049|1=Enman-ji Temple (Yokohama)}}. * A temple of the {{ill|Shingon-shū Buzan-ha|en|Shingon-shū Buzan-ha|qid=Q3077351|lt=Shingon-shū Buzan branch|1=Shingon-shū Buzan-ha}} in {{ill|Kashiwazaki, Niigata|en|Kashiwazaki, Niigata|qid=Q633983|lt=Kashiwazaki|1=Kashiwazaki, Niigata}}, {{ill|Niigata Prefecture|en|Niigata Prefecture|qid=Q132705|lt=Niigata Prefecture|1=Niigata Prefecture}}. It is the 17th temple of the {{ill|Echigo New Shikoku 88 Pilgrimage|ja|越後新四国八十八箇所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo New Shikoku 88 Pilgrimage|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Kashiwazaki)|ja|円満寺 (柏崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Kashiwazaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506052|1=Enman-ji Temple (Kashiwazaki)}}. * A temple of the {{ill|Shingon-shū Chisan-ha|en|Shingon-shū Chisan-ha|qid=Q674374|lt=Shingon-shū Chizan branch|1=Shingon-shū Chisan-ha}} in {{ill|Saku, Nagano|en|Saku, Nagano|qid=Q495821|lt=Saku|1=Saku, Nagano}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}. Its {{ill|sangō|ja|山号|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sangō|1=sangō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11058522}} is {{ill|Daihizan|ja|大悲山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daihizan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and it is also known as {{ill|Shinano Naritasan|ja|信濃成田山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinano Naritasan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Saku)|ja|円満寺 (佐久市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Saku)|1=Enman-ji Temple (Saku)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22118056}}. * A {{ill|Rinzai sect Myōshin-ji branch|ja|臨済宗妙心寺派|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinzai sect Myōshin-ji branch|1=Myōshin-ji sect|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q108821667}} temple in {{ill|Kōfu|en|Kōfu|qid=Q201932|lt=Kōfu|1=Kōfu}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|qid=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture|1=Yamanashi Prefecture}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Kōfu)|ja|円満寺 (甲府市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Kōfu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506054|1=Enman-ji Temple (Kōfu)}}. * A {{ill|Nichiren-shū|en|Nichiren-shū|qid=Q206611|lt=Nichiren sect|1=Nichiren-shū}} temple in {{ill|Numazu|en|Numazu|qid=Q241037|lt=Numazu|1=Numazu}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}; formerly known as {{ill|Shōman-ji|ja|塩満寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōman-ji|1=Enman-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q48756170}}. * A temple in {{ill|Tsuruga, Fukui|en|Tsuruga, Fukui|qid=Q847581|lt=Tsuruga|1=Tsuruga, Fukui}}, {{ill|Fukui Prefecture|en|Fukui Prefecture|qid=Q133879|lt=Fukui Prefecture|1=Fukui Prefecture}}. It is the 87th temple of the {{ill|Wakaetsu New Shikoku 88 Pilgrimage|ja|若越新四国八十八箇所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaetsu New Shikoku 88 Pilgrimage|1=Wakaetsu New Shikoku 88 Pilgrimage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q28682182}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Tsuruga)|ja|円満寺 (敦賀市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Tsuruga)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506055|1=Enman-ji Temple (Tsuruga)}}. * A {{ill|Jōdo Shinshū Izumōji-ha|ja|真宗出雲路派|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōdo Shinshū Izumōji-ha|1=Jōdo Shinshū Izumōji-ha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11583047}} temple in {{ill|Minamiechizen, Fukui|en|Minamiechizen, Fukui|qid=Q1347526|lt=Minami-Echizen Town|1=Minamiechizen, Fukui}}, {{ill|Nanjō District, Fukui|en|Nanjō District, Fukui|qid=Q776029|lt=Nanjō District|1=Nanjō District, Fukui}}, {{ill|Fukui Prefecture|en|Fukui Prefecture|qid=Q133879|lt=Fukui Prefecture|1=Fukui Prefecture}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Minami-Echizen)|ja|円満寺 (福井県南越前町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Minami-Echizen)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506057|1=Enman-ji Temple (Minami-Echizen)}}. * A {{ill|Jōdo-shū|en|Jōdo-shū|qid=Q912208|lt=Jōdo sect|1=Jōdo-shū}} temple in {{ill|Kaizu|en|Kaizu|qid=Q844056|lt=Kaizu|1=Kaizu}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|qid=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Kaizu)|ja|円満寺 (海津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Kaizu)|1=Enman-ji Temple (Kaizu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q128866491}}. * A {{ill|Shingon-shū Daikaku-ji branch|ja|真言宗大覚寺派|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingon-shū Daikaku-ji branch|1=Shingon-shū Daikakuji-ha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10437754}} temple in {{ill|Suzuka, Mie|en|Suzuka, Mie|qid=Q207311|lt=Suzuka|1=Suzuka, Mie}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|qid=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture|1=Mie Prefecture}}. It is the 23rd temple of the {{ill|Mie Shikoku 88 Pilgrimage|ja|三重四国八十八箇所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mie Shikoku 88 Pilgrimage|1=Mie Shikoku 88 Pilgrimage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11357685}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Suzuka)|ja|円満寺 (鈴鹿市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Suzuka)|1=Enman-ji Temple (Suzuka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11394814}}. * A {{ill|Rinzai sect Eigen-ji branch|ja|臨済宗永源寺派|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinzai sect Eigen-ji branch|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 臨済宗|1=Rinzai school|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q639625}} temple in {{ill|Ōmihachiman|en|Ōmihachiman|qid=Q385461|lt=Ōmihachiman|1=Ōmihachiman}}, {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|qid=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Ōmihachiman)|ja|円満寺 (近江八幡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Ōmihachiman)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506059|1=Enman-ji Temple (Ōmihachiman)}}. * A {{ill|Nichiren-shū|en|Nichiren-shū|qid=Q206611|lt=Nichiren sect|1=Nichiren-shū}} temple in {{ill|Higashinari-ku, Osaka|en|Higashinari-ku, Osaka|qid=Q985701|lt=Higashinari-ku|1=Higashinari-ku, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka|en|Osaka|qid=Q35765|lt=Osaka|1=Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Higashinari-ku)|ja|円満寺 (大阪市東成区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Higashinari-ku)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506060|1=Enman-ji Temple (Higashinari-ku)}}. * A {{ill|Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|en|Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|qid=Q10389102|lt=Jōdo Shinshū Honganji-ha|1=Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha}} temple in {{ill|Fukushima-ku, Osaka|en|Fukushima-ku, Osaka|qid=Q985728|lt=Fukushima-ku|1=Fukushima-ku, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka|en|Osaka|qid=Q35765|lt=Osaka|1=Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Fukushima-ku)|ja|円満寺 (大阪市福島区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Fukushima-ku)|qid=Q135506062|1=Enman-ji Temple (Fukushima-ku)}}. * A {{ill|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|en|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|qid=Q3077357|lt=Kōyasan Shingon|1=Kōyasan Shingon-shū}} temple in {{ill|Suita|en|Suita|qid=Q653510|lt=Suita|1=Suita}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}; officially called {{ill|Jōkō Enman-ji|ja|常光円満寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōkō Enman-ji|1=Jokoenmanji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11481316}}, with the {{ill|sangō|ja|山号|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sangō|1=sangō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11058522}} {{ill|Echijitsu-zan|ja|慧日山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echijitsu-zan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. See {{ill|Jōkō Enman-ji|ja|常光円満寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōkō Enman-ji|1=Jokoenmanji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11481316}}. * A {{ill|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|en|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|qid=Q3077357|lt=Kōyasan Shingon|1=Kōyasan Shingon-shū}} special head temple ({{ill|bekkaku honzan|ja|別格本山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/bekkaku honzan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 本山|1=honzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q24887668}}) in {{ill|Nishinomiya|en|Nishinomiya|qid=Q243853|lt=Nishinomiya|1=Nishinomiya}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}, with the {{ill|sangō|ja|山号|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sangō|1=sangō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11058522}} {{ill|Iozen|en|Iozen|qid=Q11404619|lt=Iō-zan|1=Iozen}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Nishinomiya)|ja|円満寺 (西宮市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Nishinomiya)|1=Enman-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11394815}}. * A {{ill|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|en|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|qid=Q3077357|lt=Kōyasan Shingon|1=Kōyasan Shingon-shū}} temple in {{ill|Harima, Hyōgo|en|Harima, Hyōgo|qid=Q1155297|lt=Harima|1=Harima, Hyōgo}}, {{ill|Kako District, Hyōgo|en|Kako District, Hyōgo|qid=Q1042066|lt=Kako District|1=Kako District, Hyōgo}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}, with the {{ill|sangō|ja|山号|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sangō|1=sangō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11058522}} {{ill|Gankō-zan|ja|巌光山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gankō-zan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Harima)|ja|円満寺 (兵庫県播磨町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Harima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506064|1=Enman-ji Temple (Harima)}}. * A {{ill|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|en|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|qid=Q3077357|lt=Kōyasan Shingon|1=Kōyasan Shingon-shū}} temple in {{ill|Taka, Hyōgo|en|Taka, Hyōgo|qid=Q1155253|lt=Taka|1=Taka, Hyōgo}}, {{ill|Taka District, Hyōgo|en|Taka District, Hyōgo|qid=Q1042243|lt=Taka District|1=Taka District, Hyōgo}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Taka)|ja|円満寺 (兵庫県多可町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Taka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506065|1=Enman-ji Temple (Taka)}}. * A {{ill|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|en|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|qid=Q3077357|lt=Kōyasan Shingon|1=Kōyasan Shingon-shū}} temple in {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|qid=Q169134|lt=Nara|1=Nara (city)}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|qid=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It houses {{ill|Sangaku|en|Sangaku|qid=Q2569069|lt=sangaku|1=Sangaku}}, designated a Tangible Folk Cultural Property of Nara City. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Nara)|ja|円満寺 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Nara)|qq=}}. * A {{ill|Nishiyama Jōdo sect|ja|西山浄土宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishiyama Jōdo sect|1=Seizan Jōdo-shū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q28692717}} temple in {{ill|Wakayama (city)|en|Wakayama (city)|qid=Q200747|lt=Wakayama|1=Wakayama (city)}}, {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|en|Wakayama Prefecture|qid=Q131314|lt=Wakayama Prefecture|1=Wakayama Prefecture}}. It is the 18th temple of the {{ill|Wakayama Saigoku 33 Pilgrimage|ja|和歌山西国三十三箇所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakayama Saigoku 33 Pilgrimage|1=Wakayama Saigoku 33 Pilgrimage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11417688}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Wakayama)|ja|円満寺 (和歌山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Wakayama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506067|1=Enman-ji Temple (Wakayama)}}. * A {{ill|Shingon-shū Yamashina branch|ja|真言宗山階派|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingon-shū Yamashina branch|1=Shingon-shū Yamashina branch|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10437780}} temple in {{ill|Kinokawa, Wakayama|en|Kinokawa, Wakayama|qid=Q697002|lt=Kinokawa|1=Kinokawa, Wakayama}}, {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|en|Wakayama Prefecture|qid=Q131314|lt=Wakayama Prefecture|1=Wakayama Prefecture}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Kinokawa)|ja|円満寺 (紀の川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Kinokawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506069|1=Enman-ji Temple (Kinokawa)}}. * A {{ill|Shingi Shingon|ja|新義真言宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingi Shingon|1=Shingi-Shingon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10307059}} temple in {{ill|Iwade, Wakayama|en|Iwade, Wakayama|qid=Q579623|lt=Iwade|1=Iwade, Wakayama}}, {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|en|Wakayama Prefecture|qid=Q131314|lt=Wakayama Prefecture|1=Wakayama Prefecture}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Iwade)|ja|円満寺 (岩出市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Iwade)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506070|1=Enman-ji Temple (Iwade)}}. * A {{ill|Rinzai sect Myōshin-ji branch|ja|臨済宗妙心寺派|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinzai sect Myōshin-ji branch|1=Myōshin-ji sect|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q108821667}} temple in {{ill|Arida, Wakayama|en|Arida, Wakayama|qid=Q657843|lt=Arida|1=Arida, Wakayama}}, {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|en|Wakayama Prefecture|qid=Q131314|lt=Wakayama Prefecture|1=Wakayama Prefecture}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Arida)|ja|円満寺 (有田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Arida)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506072|1=Enman-ji Temple (Arida)}}. * A {{ill|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|en|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|qid=Q3077357|lt=Kōyasan Shingon|1=Kōyasan Shingon-shū}} temple in {{ill|Tonoshō, Kagawa|en|Tonoshō, Kagawa|qid=Q1349486|lt=Tonosho|1=Tonoshō, Kagawa}}, {{ill|Shōzu District, Kagawa|en|Shōzu District, Kagawa|qid=Q643336|lt=Shōzu District|1=Shōzu District, Kagawa}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|en|Kagawa Prefecture|qid=Q161454|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}. It is the 74th temple of the {{ill|Shōdoshima 88 Pilgrimage|ja|小豆島八十八箇所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōdoshima 88 Pilgrimage|1=Shōdoshima Pilgrimage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11463795}}. See {{ill|Enman-ji (Tonosho)|ja|円満寺 (香川県土庄町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enman-ji (Tonosho)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506074|1=Enman-ji Temple (Tonosho)}}.
